title: Pungent Mincemeat Fritters
description: A flavorful and crispy fritter dish made with tender mincemeat.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the mincemeat and wheat flour.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and milk.
Add the egg mixture to the mincemeat mixture and mix until a dough forms.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Using a spoon, drop the dough mixture into the hot oil, making sure not to overcrowd the pan.
Fry the fritters for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and serve hot.
Optional: sprinkle chopped herbs on top of the fritters before serving.
